Dong Zhuo (Menggao) 董擢 (孟高)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Zhuo (董擢), styledMenggao (孟高). Dong Zhuo’s older brother and father of Dong Huang. Died relatively young.
